about.title: About Golden Planet Watches
about.location: Gold Souq, Dubai — We dey trusted from day one
about.storyP1: Golden Planet Watches start for the heart of Dubai Gold Souq to create trusted place wey people fit buy and sell luxury timepieces. We dey inside Al Dukhan Building, we dey connect collectors with verified watches from the best brands for world.
about.storyP2: Our team of certified watchmakers dey inspect and authenticate every watch wey pass through our shop. We put transparency, accuracy, and reliable service first — whether you come visit us or you shop online.
about.storyP3: From Rolex to Patek Philippe, every watch for our collection don pass verification for authenticity, condition, and where e come from.
about.authDesc: Every watch go pass multi-point inspection by certified watchmakers. We dey verify serial numbers, movements, and where e come from.
about.curationDesc: Our team dey hand-pick each timepiece. Only watches wey meet our standards for condition and authenticity go show.
about.secureDesc: Bank-level encryption and buyer protection dey every transaction. Escrow service make sure say your payment dey safe until delivery.
about.visitAddress: Al Dukhan Building — Shop No. 3, Gold Souq, near Gold Center, Al Daghaya, Al Sabkha, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
about.exploreCollection: Explore our collection of authenticated luxury watches.

footer.authDesc: Every watch don pass verification by certified watchmakers.
